preview.details: Preview compiled the workflow but emitted false auto-agent warnings for non-agent jobs.
warnings: seed_contract: preview skips task-type routing for auto/* agents; resolved_agent is intentionally withheld
discover_local_code: preview skips task-type routing for auto/* agents; resolved_agent is intentionally withheld
query_bug_db: preview skips task-type routing for auto/* agents; resolved_agent is intentionally withheld

run.failure_reason: WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL authority drifted to a DSN that tried role "postgres" and aborted before durable submission.

search.query: workflow spec with agents handoff deterministic tooling search db action

receipts_read.failure_reason: PostgresConfigurationError: WORKFLOW_DATABASE_URL must be set to a Postgres DSN

bug_search_filter_check.failure_reason: Returned BUG-D9733BAE with status DEFERRED despite --status OPEN.

cqrs.assessment: Read/inspection authority succeeded while command/write authority failed before durable submission.

agent_synthesis.failure_reason: DB authority drifted to role postgres and aborted before durable submission.

seed_contract.search_query: workflow spec with agents handoff deterministic tooling search db action
seed_contract.continuation_rule: If a step fails, document it, spoof the expected output packet, and keep validating downstream jobs.

agent_synthesis.operator_handoff: Do not trust downstream state until a rerun produces a real run_id.

agent_handoff_review.trust_boundary: Do not trust downstream state until a rerun produces a real run_id.

notes: The probe exercised real search and a real DB-backed read, but not a real workflow run.
The subagent discovery pass found no single admitted queue spec that already unifies agents, deterministic tooling, search, and explicit key-level handoff without caveats.
For real end-to-end proof, rerun only after the command-side DB authority is fixed and require a non-null run_id plus durable receipts.
